title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: September 22, 2022
summary: September 22, 2022: over the past week, the sea ice has now increased by a rate from last week of 3.70% , from the level on 09/15/2022 of 4.657 M km 2 to 4.836 M km 2 for this week. It turns out that the sea ice bottomed out only one day after last week’s report on 09/16/2022 with the final minimum...
